plugins.cameraPermission: Allow UnFocus to use your camera to scan receipts.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow UnFocus to access your photos to scan receipts.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: UnFocus uses your location to remind you about tasks tied to a place.

infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: UnFocus uses the microphone so you can add tasks and notes by voice.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: UnFocus uses your location to remind you about tasks tied to a place, like errands near a store.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: UnFocus uses your location in the background to remind you about tasks tied to a place, even when the app isn't open.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: UnFocus can add your tasks to your device calendar if you choose to sync them.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: UnFocus can suggest contacts when sharing a list, if you choose to use that feature.
